legal_model.notes_normalized: Cannabis is illegal in Ireland / Éire. Medical cannabis is legal. Distribution is illegal. Prison exposure detected.

notes_normalized: Cannabis is illegal in Ireland / Éire. Medical cannabis is legal. Distribution is illegal. Prison exposure detected.
notes_raw: {{main|Cannabis in Ireland}} The National Drugs Strategy of 2009–2016 did not favor decriminalizing cannabis.<ref>{{cite web |url=http://health.gov.ie/wp-content/uploads/2014/03/nds_2009-16.pdf#page=28 |title=National Drugs Strategy (interim) 2009–2016 |date=June 2009 |series=Official publications |volume=PN.A7/0508 |publisher=Department of Community, Rural and Gaeltacht Affairs |page=26, sec.2.49 |access-date=5 December 2016 |archive-date=24 April 2018 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20180424215634/http://health.gov.ie/wp-content/uploads/2014/03/nds_2009-16.pdf#page=28 |url-status=live }}</ref> A new strategy was planned for 2017.<ref>{{cite press release|url=http://health.gov.ie/blog/press-release/minister-catherine-byrne-td-announces-a-public-consultation-on-the-new-national-drugs-strategy/|title=Minister Catherine Byrne TD announces a Public Consultation on the New National Drugs Strategy|date=6 September 2016|publisher=Department of Health|access-date=5 December 2016|location=Ireland|archive-date=17 July 2019|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190717225521/https://health.gov.ie/blog/press-release/minister-catherine-byrne-td-announces-a-public-consultation-on-the-new-national-drugs-strategy/|url-status=live}}</ref> Cannabis-derived medicines may be licensed since 2014.<ref name=kildare>{{cite web|url=https://www.kildarestreet.com/wrans/?id=2016-10-26a.310|title=Medicinal Products Availability: : Written answers|date=26 October 2016|work=Dáil Éireann debates|publisher=KildareStreet.com|access-date=5 December 2016|archive-date=21 July 2018|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20180721073401/https://www.kildarestreet.com/wrans/?id=2016-10-26a.310|url-status=live}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.irishstatutebook.ie/eli/2014/si/323/made/en/print|title=S.I. No. 323/2014 – Misuse of Drugs (Amendment) Regulations 2014.|work=[[Irish Statute Book]]|access-date=5 December 2016|archive-date=30 September 2018|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20180930052941/http://www.irishstatutebook.ie/eli/2014/si/323/made/en/print|url-status=live}}</ref> A review of policy on medicinal cannabis was announced in November 2016,<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.kildarestreet.com/committees/?gid=2016-11-10a.1387|title=Joint Oireachtas Committee on Health: Quarterly Update on Health Issues: Discussion|last=Harris|first=Simon|date=10 November 2016|work=Oireachtas Joint and Select Committees proceedings|access-date=5 December 2016|archive-date=29 March 2017|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20170329213512/https://www.kildarestreet.com/committees/?gid=2016-11-10a.1387|url-status=live}}</ref> and a [[private member's bill]] to legalize it passed [[second reading|second stage]] in the [[Dáil Éireann|Dáil]] in December 2016.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.kildarestreet.com/debates/?id=2016-12-01a.404|title=Cannabis for Medicinal Use (Regulations) Bill 2016: Second Stage [Private Members]|date=1 December 2016|work=Dáil debates|publisher=kildarestreet.com|access-date=5 December 2016|archive-date=21 July 2018|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20180721073405/https://www.kildarestreet.com/debates/?id=2016-12-01a.404|url-status=live}}</ref><ref>{{Cite news|url=https://www.rte.ie/news/2016/1201/835669-cannabis-medicinal-use-dail/|title=Medicinal cannabis bill passes Dáil without vote|date=1 December 2016|publisher=[[RTÉ]]|access-date=2 December 2016|archive-date=21 July 2018|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20180721073203/https://www.rte.ie/news/2016/1201/835669-cannabis-medicinal-use-dail/|url-status=live}}</ref><ref>{{cite December 2016|archive-date=4 May 2018|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20180504215059/http://www.oireachtas.ie/viewdoc.asp?DocID=33497&&CatID=59|url-status=live}}</ref>
